overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit street food stall at night. The camera moves slowly around a noodle vendor's station, showing the cooking process with steam rising from a wok, and customers seated at the counter eating. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic advertisements, neon signage, and futuristic urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food cooking station with active wok

agents.ego_description: standing at the cooking station watching the vendor stir-fry noodles in a steaming wok

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk street food stall at night, focused on a large wok of noodles being cooked. Steam rises from the center of the frame where a vendor in a pink cap works. Metal prep trays sit on a shelf to the left, while neon signs glow in the background. The camera remains relatively stationary, observing the cooking process in the neon-lit market environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining counter with seated customers

events.description: camera begins panning right along the food counter revealing seated customers

agents.ego_description: moving along the counter to observe customers eating at the street food stall

notable_agents.action: customer with spiky hair and sunglasses eating noodles from a green takeout container using chopsticks
bald customer in yellow tank top sitting at the counter eating

entered.detail: seated customer with distinctive spiky hair and sunglasses eating from a green container
bald muscular customer wearing yellow tank top seated at the counter
vertical holographic advertisement showing a female figure in neon colors
metal mesh counter with food items and condiments

segments.scene_description: The camera moves right along the food counter, transitioning from the cooking area to the dining section. Two customers are visible seated at the counter - one with spiky hair eating from a green container, and a bald man in a yellow tank top. The wok and cook move to the background left as the camera focuses on the customer area, with neon holograms visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: food service counter with condiments and prepared dishes

events.description: camera tilts downward focusing on food bowls and condiment containers on the counter

agents.ego_description: examining the prepared food bowls and condiments at the end of the service counter

notable_agents.action: customer with spiky hair continuing to eat while holding green takeout container

entered.detail: white bowls containing prepared food items including noodles and dumplings
large cylindrical containers with red and green sauces with ladles
tall stack of white ceramic plates ready for serving

segments.scene_description: The camera continues to the end of the counter, focusing on prepared food bowls and condiment containers in the foreground. The customer with spiky hair remains visible on the right eating, while the bald customer moves to the left side of the frame. The cooking station is now behind the camera as the view centers on the service area with sauce containers and ready-to-serve dishes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from the heat of a cooking station to the quiet service area of a neon-lit cyberpunk food stall. It begins focused on a large wok of noodles where steam rises around a vendor in a pink cap, with glowing signs and metal prep trays framing the scene. As the camera glides to the right, the cooking area recedes into the background to reveal customers seated at the counter, including a man with spiky hair eating from a green container and a bald man in a yellow tank top. The view then expands further along the counter, passing the diners to center on a service area filled with prepared food bowls and condiment containers. Finally, the cooking station disappears entirely behind the camera as the focus settles on the ready-to-serve dishes under the glow of futuristic holograms.
